ddls:
CREATE TABLE "maternal_health_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data record */,
  "characteristic" TEXT /* Descriptive characteristic of the demographic group (e.g., Maternal age: less than 20, Major city) */,
  "attended_antenatal_care_first_trimester_percent" REAL /* Percentage of women who attended antenatal care in the first trimester */,
  "attended_antenatal_care_rate_ratio" REAL /* Rate ratio for attendance of antenatal care in the first trimester */,
  "did_not_smoke_first_20_weeks_percent" REAL /* Percentage of women who did not smoke during the first 20 weeks of pregnancy */,
  "did_not_smoke_rate_ratio" REAL /* Rate ratio for not smoking during the first 20 weeks of pregnancy */,
  "bmi_under_25_first_antenatal_visit_percent" REAL /* Percentage of women with a BMI under 25 at the first antenatal visit */,
  "bmi_under_25_rate_ratio" REAL /* Rate ratio for BMI under 25 at the first antenatal visit */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the data was collected */,
  "demographic_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the demographic group to which the data pertains */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year the data was collected */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data (e.g., survey, administrative records) */,
  "sampling_frame" TEXT /* Description of the sampling frame used (e.g., random sampling, stratified sampling) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maternal_health_data_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maternal_health_data_demographic_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("demographic_group_id") REFERENCES demographic_groups ("demographic_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the region (e.g., Major city, Very remote) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the region */,
  "population_size" INTEGER /* Estimated population size of the region */,
  "urbanization_rate" REAL /* Urbanization rate of the region (percentage) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographic_groups" (
  "demographic_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the demographic group (e.g., Maternal age: less than 20, Lowest socioeconomic area) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the demographic group */,
  "group_size" INTEGER /* Estimated size of the demographic group */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Age range of the demographic group (e.g., less than 20, 40 and over) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "query_parameters" TEXT /* Query parameters used to filter or aggregate the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES maternal_health_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interventions" (
  "intervention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each intervention */,
  "intervention_name" TEXT /* Name of the intervention */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the intervention */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the intervention */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the intervention */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the intervention is implemented */,
  "target_disease" TEXT /* Target disease or condition (e.g., hypertension, gestational diabetes) */,
  "intervention_type" TEXT /* Type of intervention (e.g., education, medication) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("intervention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interventions_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "intervention_impact" (
  "impact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each impact record */,
  "intervention_id" INTEGER /* ID of the intervention */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data record */,
  "pre_intervention_value" REAL /* Value of the health metric before the intervention */,
  "post_intervention_value" REAL /* Value of the health metric after the intervention */,
  "metric" TEXT /* Health metric being tracked (e.g., attended_antenatal_care_first_trimester_percent, did_not_smoke_first_20_weeks_percent) */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval of the impact estimate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("impact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_intervention_impact_intervention_id FOREIGN KEY ("intervention_id") REFERENCES interventions ("intervention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_intervention_impact_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES maternal_health_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Contact person for the data source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the data source */,
  "data_update_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data updates (e.g., monthly, quarterly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data record */,
  "permission_level" TEXT /* Level of permission (e.g., view, edit, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES maternal_health_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_validation" (
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation record */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data record */,
  "validation_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was validated */,
  "validation_status" TEXT /* Status of the validation (e.g., valid, invalid, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validation_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES maternal_health_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment record */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_comments_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES maternal_health_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
